elements.description: Circled numeral callouts (per room, e.g. '1'/'2'/'3') and floor-material-number boxes (e.g. '[3]+0.50(2)') are printed at each room per the symbol legend (หน้า03: circle=door number, hexagon/box=window number). Tag clusters legible per-room: ห้องครัว '[1]+0.60(1)', ห้องนอน2 '[2]+0.60(1)', ห้องนอน1 '[2]+0.60(1)', ห้องน้ำ1 '[3]+0.50(2)', ห้องน้ำ2 '[3]+0.50(2)', ทานอาหาร '[1]+0.60(1)', พักผ่อน '[1]+0.60(1)', ห้องนอน3 '[2]+0.60(1)', เฉลียง '[3]+0.50(3)', จอดรถ '[4]+0.20(3)', ซักล้าง '[3]+0.50(—)'. The bracket number is a floor-material category (matches the A-01 material list พื้น items 1-5), the parenthetical number is the door/window opening reference — but whether each parenthetical tag is a circle (door) or hexagon (window) shape is not reliably distinguishable at this resolution for every room.

warnings: This is the floor-plan-only sheet (A-04) — unlike house 1, this house prints the roof plan on a separate sheet (A-05, หน้า07) rather than combining both views on one sheet.

GRID-RELEVANT FOR หน้า00 MASTER: top dimension chain reads left to right: 1.00 (beyond grid1) | 3.20 (grid1-2, sub-split 1.30+1.90 -- see below) | 3.20 (grid2-3) | 3.20 (grid3-4, sub-split 1.30+1.90) | 1.00 (beyond grid4). Left dimension chain reads top to bottom: 0.60 (beyond gridF) then, continuing on the same tick past gridF, 0.90 (interior, gridF to a partition line) | 3.10 (that partition line to gridE) | 2.00 (gridE-D) | 3.60 (gridD-C) | 1.80 (gridC-B) | 3.15 (gridB-A), total 14.55. CORRECTED_2026-07-16_by_user: contrary to this file's earlier conclusion that none of these needed a dummy grid line, 6 dummy grid lines were added to the master (หน้า00_gridline.json) from these exact figures: x-axis 1'=-1.0 (the 1.00 beyond grid1), 1''=1.8 (from A-10's width breakdown, see ห้องน้ำ1/หน้า12_wc1_plan.json), 3'=7.7 (the 1.30 sub-split point in the grid3-4 bay, 6.4+1.30), 4'=10.6 (the 1.00 beyond grid4); y-axis F'=-0.6 (the exterior 0.60 tick beyond gridF) and F''=0.9 (the interior partition 0.90m south of gridF, the real ซักล้าง/ห้องครัว boundary -- previously mis-estimated here as '~1.50m', now pinned exactly). The earlier reading that lumped 0.60+0.90 together as one continuous '1.50m north roof overhang' was wrong -- they are two separate features (0.60 exterior canopy/eave edge, 0.90 an interior partition), not one continuous exterior dimension.

Individual door/window counts and the circle-vs-hexagon (door-vs-window) glyph distinction per room were not confidently resolvable at this image resolution — flagged for zoom review rather than guessed, consistent with the same caveat on house 1's floor plan.

ห้องนอน3's grid_ref is marked partial because ห้องน้ำ2 and a small hallway also occupy part of the grid3-4 x D-C bay; exact internal partition line position not independently re-measured here (visually consistent with the wall lines shown).

WC.1 and WC.2 are both detailed on separate 1:25 sheets: WC.1 plan is on A-10 (หน้า12) with its sections on A-11 (หน้า13); WC.2 plan is on A-12 (หน้า14) with its sections on A-13 (หน้า15). This floor-plan-level box is superseded by those sheets for exact fixture layout — see _หน้า12_wc1_plan.json and _หน้า14_wc2_plan.json.
